entity.label: Helkath
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: Smoothness, a town of Asher, on the east border (Josh. 19:25; 21:31); called also Hukok (1 Chr. 6:75).

nodes.label: Helkath
nodes.description: Smoothness, a town of Asher, on the east border (Josh. 19:25; 21:31); called also Hukok (1 Chr. 6:75).

verses.text: And their border was Helkath, and Hali, and Beten, and Achshaph,
Helkath with her suburbs, and Rehob with her suburbs; four cities.
